title: Maids and Housekeeping Cleaners
description: Perform any combination of light cleaning duties to maintain private households or commercial establishments, such as hotels and hospitals, in a clean and orderly manner. Duties may include making beds, replenishing linens, cleaning rooms and halls, and vacuuming.

tasks.text: Keep storage areas and carts well-stocked, clean, and tidy.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Carry linens, towels, toilet items, and cleaning supplies, using wheeled carts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean rooms, hallways, lobbies, lounges, restrooms, corridors, elevators, stairways, locker rooms, and other work areas so that health standards are met.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Empty wastebaskets, empty and clean ashtrays, and transport other trash and waste to disposal areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sweep, scrub, wax, or polish floors, using brooms, mops, or powered scrubbing and waxing machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Replenish supplies, such as drinking glasses, linens, writing supplies, and bathroom items.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean rugs, carpets, upholstered furniture, and draperies, using vacuum cleaners and shampooers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Wash windows, walls, ceilings, and woodwork, waxing and polishing as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dust and polish furniture and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Disinfect equipment and supplies, using germicides or steam-operated sterilizers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe precautions required to protect hotel and guest property and report damage, theft, and found articles to supervisors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sort, count, and mark clean linens and store them in linen closets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sort clothing and other articles, load washing machines, and iron and fold dried items.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Move and arrange furniture and turn mattresses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Replace light bulbs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Deliver television sets, ironing boards, baby cribs, and rollaway beds to guests' rooms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Hang draperies and dust window blinds.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Request repair services and wait for repair workers to arrive.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare rooms for meetings and arrange decorations, media equipment, and furniture for social or business functions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Polish silver accessories and metalwork, such as fixtures and fittings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
